01 — Logo System

The Atlanta IAM Mark

The primary Atlanta IAM mark is a circular badge uniting the Atlanta skyline, security shield, keyhole, and the arc "Advancing Identity Security." One mark — place, protection, and community.

03 — Typography

Type System

Rajdhani for display and headings — bold, geometric, echoing the badge aesthetic. Inter for body. Space Mono for metadata, URLs, and technical labels.

Rajdhani · 700 · Hero Display
52–108px · tracking 0.04em
Atlanta IAM
Rajdhani · 700 · H1
36–48px
Identity is the New Perimeter
Inter · 700 · H2
22–28px
Zero Trust Architecture in Practice
Inter · 600 · H3
18–20px
Privileged Access Management Fundamentals
Inter · 400 · Body
14–16px · line-height 1.78
The Atlanta IAM User Group brings together identity and access management practitioners across the greater Atlanta metro. Peer-to-peer. Vendor-neutral. Visit atlantaiam.com.
Inter · 500 · Eyebrow
10–11px · tracking 0.24em · CAPS
Advancing Identity Security in Atlanta · Q1 2025 · atlantaiam.com
Space Mono · Technical Labels
10–13px · orange for URLs
atlantaiam.com · Atlanta IAM · March 31, 2025 · 6:00 PM ET
Space Mono · URL Display
Always link to atlantaiam.com
atlantaiam.com

05 — Voice & Tone

Brand Voice

Practitioner-to-practitioner. Honest, direct, technically grounded. No hype. Everything at events and atlantaiam.com lives these principles.

01
Expert Without Ego
We share deep technical knowledge as peers, not authorities.
"Here's what actually happens when you federate across Entra ID and PingFederate."
02
Honest & Direct
We name trade-offs, call out complexity, respect our audience's time.
"Legacy IAM fails because nobody has permission to subtract."
03
Rooted in Atlanta
Local, practical, connected to where this work happens every day.
"Atlanta is a proving ground for enterprise identity at scale."
04
Energizing
IAM is hard and undervalued. We celebrate wins and learn from failures.
"You built something that protects real people. That matters."
05
Vendor Neutral
We platform sponsors with gratitude, never advocacy.
"Sponsored by Ping Identity — we're still giving you the unfiltered truth."
06
Community First
Every post at atlantaiam.com serves practitioners, not the brand.
"Bring your hardest problem. This room has solved a version of it."
Vocabulary

✓ USE THESE

Atlanta IAM atlantaiam.com practitioners identity security user group peer learning

✗ AVOID

ATL-IAM AtlantaIAM disruptive best-in-class synergy leverage
06 — Usage Rules

Do's & Don'ts

"Atlanta IAM" — two words, title case, always. Canonical URL: atlantaiam.com.

✓ Do
Always write "Atlanta IAM" — two words, title case
Link exclusively to atlantaiam.com
Use the circular badge as primary mark on all materials
Apply on deep navy or pure white surfaces
Use Rajdhani for all headlines and display text
Scale proportionally — never stretch
Maintain clear space = 20% of badge diameter
✗ Don't
Use "ATL-IAM," "atl-iam," "AtlantaIAM"
Reference any URL other than atlantaiam.com
Place badge on busy backgrounds without overlay
Stretch, skew, or distort the badge mark
Recreate the badge manually — use asset files
Use below 32px digital / 0.5in print
Use system fonts (Arial, Helvetica) in brand comms
